  Hello, I'm Fadil. 
  I'm a Master's CS student at the Johns Hopkins University. This is my personal website. 
  Here I mainly post projects that I've undertaken along with tutorial-like documentation. 
  I'm always eager to connect, so if you'd like to discuss projects, share ideas, or simply say hello,
  feel free to reach out! Connect with me on LinkedIn and GitHub (links in the footer), or send me an email through the 'Contact' section.
